description_long: This sculpture depicts a dramatic scene with three human figures intricately intertwined. The central figure, a muscular man, stands upright with one arm raised, gripping another figure who appears to be a woman being lifted or carried. At the base, a third figure lies on the ground, partially draped in cloth, adding to the dynamic composition. The figures are rendered in a realistic style, with detailed musculature and expressive postures. The sculpture is mounted on a rectangular base, which provides stability and frames the scene. The material appears to be bronze or a similar metal, giving the piece a rich, dark brown patina.
description: A dynamic bronze sculpture featuring three intertwined human figures, with one man lifting a woman and another figure lying at the base. The piece is highly detailed and mounted on a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central male figure lifting a woman, with a third figure lying at the base, all details clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view emphasizing the muscular back of the central figure and the draped form of the woman, with the base figure partially obscured.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the backs of the figures and the flowing drapery, with the base figure's position more visible.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the interaction between the standing and lifted figures, with the base figure's form and drapery prominent.
attribute_subject_matter: three intertwined human figures in a dramatic scene
attribute_location_context: No visible context; background is isolated and does not indicate a specific setting.
